overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player character walks along wet sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passes holographic advertisements, and crosses a busy intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: passing a seated NPC on a concrete bench to the right
pedestrian walks toward camera along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway, passing a seated NPC on a bench

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on concrete bench facing the street
pedestrian walking toward camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with neon lights underneath
industrial metal lattice wall behind the bench
simple concrete bench with seated NPC against the wall
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays hanging from buildings
reflective pavement with yellow tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath an elevated highway at night. Neon holographic billboards illuminate the scene from above. A seated NPC rests on a concrete bench to the right against a metal mesh wall. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as a pedestrian approaches from the distance.

events.description: turning left at the corner to follow the sidewalk under the overpass
vehicles passing by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and continuing along the sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving along the street under the overpass

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns supporting the elevated highway
road crossing with traffic signals and multiple lanes

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the corner, the scene reveals a street intersection ahead. Massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway line the left side of the sidewalk. Vehicles drive along the street to the left while the path continues forward under the overpass structure.

events.description: passing brightly lit neon storefronts and advertisements on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk past various commercial establishments with bright neon signage

entered.detail: fast food establishment with bright red neon signage reading GUT HOUSE and BURRITO XXL
large illuminated billboard displaying a motorcycle with rider
sidewalk covered by the overpass with ceiling lights

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the covered commercial walkway beneath the elevated highway. The right side features the GUT HOUSE restaurant with bright red neon signage and large digital advertisements including a motorcycle billboard. The street to the left has parked vehicles while the path remains sheltered under the overpass.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with pedestrians waiting to cross ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk approaching a crosswalk with other pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt ahead
illuminated traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the covered walkway where the sidewalk meets a crosswalk. A group of pedestrians waits ahead at the traffic light. The street opens up ahead with visible crosswalk markings and traffic signals, while the elevated highway structure continues overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with large digital billboards

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk and beginning to cross the street
turning to look around after reaching the other side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving through a crowd of pedestrians, then turning to observe the intersection

notable_agents.action: woman with distinctive blue hair standing at the corner looking around
yellow van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated screen displaying COLA advertisement with red and white colors
tall building with prominent red CRESCENT signage
wide open street crossing with multiple lanes and traffic
tropical palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection. The camera crosses the street along with a crowd of pedestrians, passing a woman with blue hair. A massive COLA digital billboard dominates the far side of the intersection, while the CRESCENT building rises to the left. After crossing, the camera turns to reveal the bustling intersection with neon-lit skyscrapers and palm trees in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit sidewalk beneath an elevated highway into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by moving along a covered walkway where holographic billboards reflect off wet pavement and a lone NPC rests against a metal mesh wall. As the camera turns left at a corner, the view shifts to reveal massive concrete pillars and flowing traffic before continuing past the bright red neon signage and digital motorcycle advertisements of the GUT HOUSE restaurant. The scene then opens up as the walkway ends at a crosswalk, where the camera joins a group of pedestrians waiting at a traffic light. Finally, the movement emerges into a vast open intersection, crossing the street past a blue-haired woman toward a massive COLA billboard and the towering CRESCENT building, eventually turning to reveal a skyline of neon skyscrapers and distant palm trees.
